summary: Pristine recording with a killer "Other One" and a sweet St. Stephen tease, marred only by a slight mid‑range dip.
review: The show shines thanks to an explosive second‑set momentum, highlighted by a monster The Other One that carries the rest of the performance. A brief St. Stephen tease before He's Gone adds a nice surprise, and the recording is described as very good and almost pristine despite a modest mid‑range shortfall.

ai_rating.rationale: All three reviewers gave high marks (5, 5, 4) and praised both the musical performance (standout Other One, St. Stephen tease) and the audio quality (very good/pristine). Minor recording comments keep the rating just shy of perfect.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Mix is described as pristine with only a slight mid‑range deficiency; overall very very good sound.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Late second‑set momentum builds strongly, with The Other One driving the rest of the show and a nice St. Stephen tease adding intrigue.
